message:
test(fcp-core,fcp-sdk): expand zone_keys, streaming, and ratelimit tests

zone_keys: +27 tests (58→85) covering HPKE wrap/unwrap edge cases,
AAD tampering detection, key ring operations, manifest serde roundtrips.
streaming: +32 tests (48→80) covering SequentialEventProcessor lifecycle,
overflow policies, timeout pruning, EventStreamManager replay/nack.
ratelimit: +25 tests (38→63) covering tracker consumption edge cases,
pool builder variants, soft/hard enforcement, overflow protection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
